summary: The user requested a detailed itinerary for a one-month trip to Cuba, focusing on small towns and avoiding big resorts. The assistant provided a comprehensive travel plan that included various destinations and activities throughout the island, starting and ending in Havana.
facts: The user plans to spend one full month in Cuba, starting and ending in Havana. The itinerary includes visiting small towns and avoiding big resorts or luxurious hotels. The user will explore Havana for the first three days, including Old Havana and the Malecón. The user will visit Viñales for three days, engaging in horseback riding and hiking. The user will spend four days in Cienfuegos, visiting the Palacio de Valle and taking a boat tour of the Bay of Pigs. The user will explore Trinidad for four days, enjoying live music and visiting the Museo Romantico. The user will visit Camagüey for four days, exploring its art scene and nearby beaches. The user will spend four days in Santiago de Cuba, visiting the Castillo del Morro and Casa de la Trova. The user will visit Baracoa for four days, enjoying its natural beauty and unique cuisine. The user will return to Havana for the final days to relax and enjoy the city's atmosphere.
